findings.description: OTel SDK silently ignores second set_tracer_provider() — spans go to first provider's exporter
findings.proposedRule: [P54] Use standalone provider.get_tracer() when multiple providers exist in one process

findings.description: Helm upgrades without --atomic leave releases in failed state, cascading to downstream tests
findings.proposedRule: [P55] Always use --atomic + try/finally recovery in test Helm upgrades

findings.description: Bare except: pass in finally blocks hides CI debugging clues
findings.proposedRule: [P56] Best-effort cleanup MUST log with logging.warning()

findings.description: docker inspect range template concatenates all network IPs without separator
findings.proposedRule: [P57] Pin docker inspect to specific network name, not range over all
